nasb.text: Or if I should send a plague against that country and pour out My wrath in blood on it to cut off man and beast from it,

esv.text: “Or if I send a pestilence into that land and pour out my wrath upon it with blood, to cut off from it man and beast,

cnv.text: 如果我使瘟疫流行那地，藉著流血的事把我的烈怒傾倒在那地上，使人和牲畜都從那地剪除；

ccb.text: 倘若我叫瘟疫在那里肆虐，发烈怒毁灭那里的人和牲畜，
